# Playwright Test Coverage: Unified Monolithic Topology

## Objective
Establish rigorous test coverage strictly for the single-tenant, monolithic `NEO_CHROMA_UNIFIED=true` configuration.

## Tasks
1. Isolate test cases in Playwright that specifically mock the unified fallback logic.
2. Ensure both the Memory Core and Knowledge Base successfully read and write to the same single ChromaDB mock instance without collection space collisions.
3. Verify that `DreamService` successfully queries the local instance natively without instantiating secondary HTTP clients.
